news.title:
Metal stocks, including Vedanta, Tata Steel, and Hindustan Copper, fell up to 6% as Nifty Metal index dropped 4.25%.
Geopolitical tensions and supply concerns led to fears of demand destruction, impacting steel and aluminium producers.
news.summary:
Metal stocks, including Vedanta, Tata Steel, and Hindustan Copper, fell up to 6% as Nifty Metal index dropped 4.25%.
Geopolitical tensions and supply concerns led to fears of demand destruction, impacting steel and aluminium producers.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper among 4 Nifty500 stocks showing bullish White Marubozu pattern.
White Marubozu indicates opening as lowest and closing as highest price in a period.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper among 4 Nifty500 stocks showing bullish White Marubozu pattern.
White Marubozu indicates opening as lowest and closing as highest price in a period.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper fined Rs. 9.8 lakh by BSE, NSE for SEBI compliance issues.
Non-compliance pertains to Board composition; company seeks exemption and appointments.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper fined Rs. 9.8 lakh by BSE, NSE for SEBI compliance issues.
Non-compliance pertains to Board composition; company seeks exemption and appointments.

news.title: Hindustan Copper plans to triple production capacity from 4M tonnes to 12.2M by 2031.
news.summary: Hindustan Copper plans to triple production capacity from 4M tonnes to 12.2M by 2031.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper fined Rs. 9.77 lakh by exchanges for board and committee non-compliance.
Company seeks director appointments to resolve issues and waive fines; board appointments tied to Ministry of Mines.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper fined Rs. 9.77 lakh by exchanges for board and committee non-compliance.
Company seeks director appointments to resolve issues and waive fines; board appointments tied to Ministry of Mines.

news.title:
Ministry of Mines stayed demand notice against Hindustan Copper by Jharkhand's District Mining Officer.
Stay effective till next hearing; state govt directed to avoid coercive actions impacting mining operations.
news.summary:
Ministry of Mines stayed demand notice against Hindustan Copper by Jharkhand's District Mining Officer.
Stay effective till next hearing; state govt directed to avoid coercive actions impacting mining operations.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper received ₹929 crore demand notice from Jharkhand for alleged Surda mine violations.
Q3 profit surged to ₹156 crore; revenue doubled to ₹687.3 crore. Shares fell 5.5% to ₹590.35 on BSE.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper received ₹929 crore demand notice from Jharkhand for alleged Surda mine violations.
Q3 profit surged to ₹156 crore; revenue doubled to ₹687.3 crore. Shares fell 5.5% to ₹590.35 on BSE.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper faces Rs.929.4 crore demand for alleged production without valid clearances.
The company denies allegations, plans legal action; financial impact depends on final order.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper faces Rs.929.4 crore demand for alleged production without valid clearances.
The company denies allegations, plans legal action; financial impact depends on final order.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper Ltd plans to enter the critical minerals sector, leveraging mining expertise.
This strategic move aligns with India's technological and economic priorities.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper Ltd plans to enter the critical minerals sector, leveraging mining expertise.
This strategic move aligns with India's technological and economic priorities.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper and SEPC resolved disputes on contracts worth Rs. 206.3 crore.
Mutual settlement reached for Rs. 18.8 crore with no impact on profitability.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper and SEPC resolved disputes on contracts worth Rs. 206.3 crore.
Mutual settlement reached for Rs. 18.8 crore with no impact on profitability.

news.title: Hindustan Copper declares a dividend of ₹1 per share.
news.summary: Hindustan Copper declares a dividend of ₹1 per share.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper's Q3 FY26 revenue rose to Rs.687.3 crore from Rs.327.8 crore YoY.
The company declared a Re.1/share interim dividend, payable by 06.03.2026.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper's Q3 FY26 revenue rose to Rs.687.3 crore from Rs.327.8 crore YoY.
The company declared a Re.1/share interim dividend, payable by 06.03.2026.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper, Suzlon, and PFC shares are in focus ahead of Q3 results. Hindustan Copper shares, up 140% in 6 months, fell 3.25% to Rs 593.7.
Suzlon dropped 1.69% to Rs 49, down 12% YoY. PFC gained 0.5% and is up 17% YTD, indicating neutral market sentiment.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper, Suzlon, and PFC shares are in focus ahead of Q3 results. Hindustan Copper shares, up 140% in 6 months, fell 3.25% to Rs 593.7.
Suzlon dropped 1.69% to Rs 49, down 12% YoY. PFC gained 0.5% and is up 17% YTD, indicating neutral market sentiment.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper faces challenges as LME Copper prices drop over 5%.
The price decline results from a significant selloff in the metals market.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper faces challenges as LME Copper prices drop over 5%.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper shares dropped 18%, wiping ₹18,000 crore in value over two days.
Global commodity sell-off hit metal stocks; gold, silver fell 9%, impacting Nifty Metal Index.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper shares dropped 18%, wiping ₹18,000 crore in value over two days.

news.title:
13.9 Cr shares of Hindustan Copper were traded on Thursday.
Axis Bank posted gains for the third consecutive day.
news.summary:

news.title: Hindustan Copper hits upper circuit; plans Rs 2,000 cr capex over 5-6 years.
news.summary: Hindustan Copper hits upper circuit; plans Rs 2,000 cr capex over 5-6 years.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper shares are set for their best January since 2012.
The stock has doubled in value over the past two months.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper shares are set for their best January since 2012.
The stock has doubled in value over the past two months.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper Ltd to hold board meeting on 05.02.2026 to approve Q3 FY26 unaudited financial results.
The board will also consider declaring an interim dividend for FY26. Trading window remains closed till 07.02.2026.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper Ltd to hold board meeting on 05.02.2026 to approve Q3 FY26 unaudited financial results.
The board will also consider declaring an interim dividend for FY26. Trading window remains closed till 07.02.2026.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper executed an NSE block trade for ~360,405 shares at Rs. 601.3.
The total transaction value of the block trade was Rs. 21.67 crores.
news.summary:
